spoilers.title: Oda about One Piece: One Piece may be a humongous story, but I love for people to enjoy the casual banter on the ship between the Straw Hats. Or the relationship with the people they meet on the vario
spoilers.text: Oda about One Piece: One Piece may be a humongous story, but I love for people to enjoy the casual banter on the ship between the Straw Hats. Or the relationship with the people they meet on the various islands. It's those little things that matter most to me. So I hope you read it casually. I always tell people that Manga isn't a big deal. It's a way to kill time. I want to be the king of wasting time, so I hope people just read and watch it casually.

misc.title: Luffy voice actress Mayumi Tanaka after receiving the “Best Supporting VA” award at the 20th Seiyuu Awards for her role as Turbo Granny in Dandadan said: “I don’t think I’ll be able to live as long as
misc.text: Luffy voice actress Mayumi Tanaka after receiving the “Best Supporting VA” award at the 20th Seiyuu Awards for her role as Turbo Granny in Dandadan said: “I don’t think I’ll be able to live as long as Mako-san (Masako Nozawa,Goku Va), but I’ll do my best for another 10 years or so.”

misc.title: Oda about Live-action Chopper: I was worried, but I was shared materials from the early stages. They did tend to see Chopper as this living creature at first, concerned about being true to the animal
misc.text: Oda about Live-action Chopper: I was worried, but I was shared materials from the early stages. They did tend to see Chopper as this living creature at first, concerned about being true to the animal bone structure, for instance, and bringing some realism to his look. So I suggested they think of him as a stuffed toy. If you make him too realistic, it'll go into uncanny valley. So think of him as a cute plushie. Chopper's voice was something we discussed a lot to get right too. When I think of cute characters in live action Hollywood films, their cuteness feels a bit tongue-in-cheek to make them more palatable to adults. But Chopper needs to look and sound cute. I think it's a cuteness that's unique to Japan. I felt like Chopper needs that more than Hollywood's cuteness.

items.text: Luffy voice actress Mayumi Tanaka after receiving the “Best Supporting VA” award at the 20th Seiyuu Awards for her role as Turbo Granny in Dandadan said: “I don’t think I’ll be able to live as long as Mako-san (Masako Nozawa,Goku Va), but I’ll do my best for another 10 years or so.”

items.title: Oda about Live-action Chopper: I was worried, but I was shared materials from the early stages. They did tend to see Chopper as this living creature at first, concerned about being true to the animal
items.text: Oda about Live-action Chopper: I was worried, but I was shared materials from the early stages. They did tend to see Chopper as this living creature at first, concerned about being true to the animal bone structure, for instance, and bringing some realism to his look. So I suggested they think of him as a stuffed toy. If you make him too realistic, it'll go into uncanny valley. So think of him as a cute plushie. Chopper's voice was something we discussed a lot to get right too. When I think of cute characters in live action Hollywood films, their cuteness feels a bit tongue-in-cheek to make them more palatable to adults. But Chopper needs to look and sound cute. I think it's a cuteness that's unique to Japan. I felt like Chopper needs that more than Hollywood's cuteness.
